text: Hello. Hello. Good evening. My name is Lena. I am just checking something as per our records from your local county in the state of North Carolina. So just quickly confirm both part A and B of your Medicare are currently active, right? No. Sorry, but you do not seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
